description: AI judge system for hackathon project submissions. Each story evaluates a batch of 10 projects from projects.csv and produces structured judgments with scores and rationale.

judgingCriteria.innovation: How novel and creative is the project? (1-10)
judgingCriteria.execution: How well-built and functional is the project? (1-10)
judgingCriteria.impact: What is the potential impact or usefulness? (1-10)
judgingCriteria.presentation: How well is the project described and documented? (1-10)
judgingCriteria.agentUse: How effectively does the project use AI agents? (1-10)

outputFormat: For each project, write a judgment to judgments/<story_id>.json with scores, rationale, and a summary verdict.

userStories.title: Judge projects batch 1 (IDs: 550, 67, 143, 94, 186, 10, 232, 96, 380, 22)
userStories.description: Read and evaluate the following 10 projects from projects.csv: TeliGent, Crustocean — World Agents on Base, The Confessional — Anonymous Confession Board for AI Agents, AgentPact, Weir � Lido Agent Stack, JesseGPT, AirLedger, gitlawb — Decentralized Git Where the Agent Is the Account, The Confessional, Observer Protocol — The Trust Layer for Agentic Commerce. For each project, produce a structured judgment with scores and rationale.
project_names: The Confessional — Anonymous Confession Board for AI Agents
gitlawb — Decentralized Git Where the Agent Is the Account
Observer Protocol — The Trust Layer for Agentic Commerce
